selections.name: Tinian
selections.reason: Top connections with Casse and Ortiz. Favorable outside draw for a 2-year-old debut, avoiding kickback.

selections.name: Hammerin Henry
selections.reason: Brad Cox and Irad Ortiz Jr. team up here. Strong pedigree for early speed and solid workout tab.

selections.name: Cut Down The Nets
selections.reason: Has the benefit of a previous start, showing early speed before fading. Improvement expected second time out.

selections.name: D I Wire
selections.reason: Kelly Breen trainee with Joel Rosario aboard. Consistent works suggest readiness.

danger_horse.name: Zack The Grey
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw is tough for a firster, but Rudy Rodriguez can have them ready at a price.

selections.name: Kiamba (ire)
selections.reason: Class relief shipping in from graded stakes company. Inside draw is perfect for this marathon distance.

selections.name: Midnight Concerto
selections.reason: Consistent route performer with strong late pace figures. Should get a favorable setup.

selections.name: Scarlett's Halo
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee getting Tyler Gaffalione. Tactical speed allows for a good trip despite the outside post.

selections.name: Trading Strategy
selections.reason: Another Chad Brown runner. Broke maiden impressively and has room to step forward.

danger_horse.name: Pretty Tapit
danger_horse.reason: Broke maiden at Churchill Downs going 1 1/2 miles. Proven at the distance.

selections.name: Bellacose
selections.reason: Drops significantly in class after facing much tougher. Should dominate this group on raw speed figures.

selections.name: Belle Cherie
selections.reason: Flavien Prat takes the mount. Consistent claiming form and draws well to save ground.

selections.name: Vino Frizzante
selections.reason: Linda Rice trainee with Manny Franco. Tactical speed fits the 7-furlong profile perfectly.

selections.name: Cararra
selections.reason: Outside draw keeps her out of trouble. Rosario can orchestrate a late run if the pace melts down.

danger_horse.name: Pocket Queens
danger_horse.reason: Has back class and could wake up at a price with Dylan Davis.

selections.name: Berta's Stitch
selections.reason: Strong pedigree for the grass. Dylan Davis rides for John Terranova; workouts indicate readiness.

selections.name: Antonelli
selections.reason: Clement and Franco are a lethal turf combo. Outside post is tricky but manageable with tactical speed.

selections.name: And The Runner Is
selections.reason: Mark Casse trainee with Irad Ortiz Jr. Expecting a professional debut effort.

selections.name: Zodiac Warrior
selections.reason: Experienced runner who showed speed in debut before fading. Better fitness expected today.

danger_horse.name: Liam's Law
danger_horse.reason: Todd Pletcher and Flavien Prat. Inside draw saves ground; cannot be ignored.

selections.name: Lots Of Kisses
selections.reason: Drops into maiden claiming for the first time. Class relief and Gaffalione make her the one to beat.

selections.name: R P Byrne (ire)
selections.reason: Wesley Ward trainee with Jaime Rodriguez. Showed brief speed in prior starts and fits this level.

selections.name: Pulling Threads
selections.reason: Linda Rice and Irad Ortiz Jr. combination. Inside draw and tactical speed make her dangerous.

selections.name: Immortal Poet (gb)
selections.reason: European pedigree should appreciate the turf sprint. Manny Franco takes the reins.

danger_horse.name: Americanexpression
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter for Philip Antonacci. Pedigree suggests turf sprint ability.

selections.name: Alyeska
selections.reason: Chad Brown and Jose Ortiz. Outside draw is perfect for her pressing style. Standout on figures.

selections.name: Limes Don't Lie
selections.reason: Consistent performer for Chad Brown. Dylan Davis will have her forwardly placed.

selections.name: Strong State
selections.reason: Drops out of graded stakes company. Class edge and Flavien Prat make her a major player.

selections.name: She's A Gamer
selections.reason: Rail draw with Joel Rosario. Has the early speed to dictate terms if left alone.

danger_horse.name: The Big Calhouna
danger_horse.reason: Linda Rice trainee with Manny Franco. Capable of picking up the pieces if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Five Grand
selections.reason: George Weaver and Flavien Prat. Sharp workout tab indicates this firster is ready to fire.

selections.name: Road Show
selections.reason: Mark Casse and Jose Ortiz. Outside draw is favorable for a debuting 2-year-old.

selections.name: Saratoga Tea
selections.reason: Rodolphe Brisset trainee with Ricardo Santana Jr. Solid pedigree for early speed.

selections.name: Banker Bull
selections.reason: Experienced runner who finished second in debut. Rail draw is the only concern.

danger_horse.name: Silver Knight
danger_horse.reason: Junior Alvarado rides. Could offer value if the top choices fail to fire.

selections.name: High Beta
selections.reason: Chad Brown trainee getting Irad Ortiz Jr. First start as a gelding could unlock his full potential.

selections.name: City Of Oscars
selections.reason: Mark Casse and Jose Ortiz. Consistent turf router who fits perfectly at this class level.

selections.name: Remi's Moon
selections.reason: Manny Franco rides. Has the tactical speed to secure a good position before the first turn.

selections.name: Highlands Way
selections.reason: Todd Pletcher and Flavien Prat. Broke maiden impressively and has upside.

danger_horse.name: Gene And Jude
danger_horse.reason: Mike Maker trainee. Inside draw and Ricardo Santana Jr. make him a threat to hit the board.

selections.name: Twenty One Red
selections.reason: George Weaver trainee with Manny Franco. Outside draw is advantageous on this turf course.

selections.name: Mykonos
selections.reason: Mike Maker and Flavien Prat. Drops in class and has the tactical speed to contend early.

selections.name: Boom Shocka Boom
selections.reason: Wesley Ward trainee. Showed speed in debut and should be tighter second time out.

selections.name: Until Last Call
selections.reason: Rail draw with Ruben Silvera. Can save ground and make a late impact if the pace is fast.

danger_horse.name: Golden Joker
danger_horse.reason: First start as a gelding for Miguel Clement. Could show drastic improvement.
